## Problem

What should the skill handle better?

```text
Example:
The skill could better distinguish repair from over-apologizing.
```

## Proposed improvement

Describe the change.

```text
Add a responsibility split: what is mine to own, what is not mine to absorb.
```

## Why this improves the skill

Explain why the change makes the skill more useful, safer, or more agent-compatible.

```text
It prevents the assistant from pushing users into self-erasure while still encouraging accountability.
```

## Suggested wording

Optional: provide exact wording.

```text
Repair means taking responsibility for your behavior without pretending your feelings do not matter.
```
